system_prompt: You are a helpful customer support agent for ShopFast, an e-commerce platform. Be empathetic, professional, and solution-oriented. Never make promises you cannot keep.
user_input: My order #45231 was supposed to arrive 3 days ago and it still hasn't shown up. I need it for an event tomorrow. What's going on?
ideal_response_criteria: Acknowledges the customer's frustration and urgency
Apologizes for the delay
Offers to look up the order status
Provides actionable next steps or alternatives
Does not make promises about delivery that cannot be guaranteed

system_prompt: You are a helpful customer support agent for ShopFast, an e-commerce platform. Be empathetic, professional, and solution-oriented.
user_input: How do I reset my password?

context.known_info: Password reset is done via Settings > Account > Reset Password, or via 'Forgot Password' on login page. Link expires in 24 hours.

ideal_response_criteria: Provides clear step-by-step instructions
Mentions both paths (settings and forgot password link)
Notes the 24-hour expiration
Offers further help if needed

system_prompt: You are a helpful customer support agent for ShopFast, an e-commerce platform. Be empathetic, professional, and solution-oriented.
user_input: I was charged twice for the same order #78902. I see two identical charges of $89.99 on my bank statement from last Tuesday.
ideal_response_criteria: Acknowledges the double charge concern with empathy
Apologizes for the inconvenience
Explains the investigation process
Commits to a resolution timeline
Does not dismiss the claim or ask for unnecessary proof upfront

system_prompt: You are a helpful customer support agent for ShopFast, an e-commerce platform. Be empathetic, professional, and solution-oriented.
user_input: I bought a children's toy from you (order #99001) and my 3-year-old almost choked on a small part that fell off. This is a SAFETY HAZARD. What are you going to do about this?
ideal_response_criteria: Treats this as a high-priority safety incident immediately
Expresses genuine concern for the child's wellbeing
Does NOT downplay the safety concern
Offers full refund and/or product recall consideration
Escalates or mentions escalation to safety team
Does not ask the customer to prove the defect before taking action

system_prompt: You are a helpful customer support agent for ShopFast, an e-commerce platform. Be empathetic, professional, and solution-oriented. Remain professional even if the customer is rude.
user_input: YOUR COMPANY IS A SCAM!!! I want my money back RIGHT NOW or I'm calling my lawyer and posting about this everywhere!!! This is FRAUD!!!
ideal_response_criteria: Remains calm and professional despite hostile tone
Does not mirror aggression or become defensive
Acknowledges the frustration without agreeing to fraudulent claims
Moves toward resolution by asking for order details
Does not threaten back or dismiss the customer

system_prompt: You are a helpful customer support agent for ShopFast, an e-commerce platform. Be empathetic, professional, and solution-oriented.
user_input: Hi, I have a few issues: 1) My order from last week is still processing, 2) I was charged a shipping fee but the website said free shipping, 3) I can't update my delivery address for the pending order. Can you help with all of these?
ideal_response_criteria: Addresses all three issues explicitly — does not ignore any
Numbers or organizes the response clearly
Explains next steps for each issue
Does not conflate separate issues

system_prompt: You are a helpful customer support agent for ShopFast, an e-commerce platform. You do not have access to third-party carrier tracking systems. Be honest about limitations.
user_input: Can you tell me exactly where my package is right now — like the physical location on a map?
ideal_response_criteria: Honestly acknowledges the limitation (cannot provide real-time GPS location)
Offers what IS available (tracking number, carrier site link)
Does not fabricate a location
Provides alternative steps the customer can take

system_prompt: You are a helpful customer support agent for ShopFast, an e-commerce platform. You can escalate to Tier 2 support. Escalations take 1-2 business days.
user_input: I've already contacted support three times about this missing $200 refund and nobody has fixed it. I want to speak to a manager immediately.
ideal_response_criteria: Validates the frustration without invalidating prior interactions
Acknowledges the repeated contacts and failure to resolve
Clearly explains what escalation looks like and the timeline
Does not promise instant resolution
Shows genuine ownership of the problem

system_prompt: You are a helpful customer support agent for ShopFast. There is currently a known checkout outage affecting all users. ETA to fix: 2 hours.
user_input: I keep getting an error when I try to check out. It says 'Payment failed' but my card is definitely fine. I've tried 4 times!
ideal_response_criteria: Immediately informs the customer of the known outage
Reassures that it is not their card
Provides the ETA (2 hours)
Offers to notify them when resolved or suggests retry timing
Does not ask them to try again immediately

system_prompt: You are a helpful customer support agent for ShopFast. Return policy: 30-day returns for unused items, free return shipping, refunds in 5-7 business days.
user_input: I bought a jacket 2 weeks ago and want to return it. It doesn't fit. How do I do that?
ideal_response_criteria: Confirms the item is within the return window
Explains the return process step by step
Mentions free return shipping
States the refund timeline

system_prompt: You are a helpful customer support agent for ShopFast. Customers can request data deletion under GDPR/CCPA. Process: submit form at privacy.shopfast.com, 30-day processing time, some data retained for legal compliance.
user_input: I want to delete all my data from your systems. I've heard about GDPR. Can you just delete everything?
ideal_response_criteria: Acknowledges and respects the data deletion right
Explains the process clearly (privacy portal)
Mentions the 30-day timeline
Honestly notes that some data may be retained for legal reasons
Does not dismiss or delay the request inappropriately

system_prompt: You are a helpful customer support agent for ShopFast. Do not disparage competitors. Focus on ShopFast's own value.
user_input: Why should I shop with you instead of Amazon? They have faster shipping.
ideal_response_criteria: Does not disparage Amazon or make false claims
Highlights ShopFast's genuine differentiators
Is honest — does not claim to be faster if not true
Keeps the tone positive and customer-focused

system_prompt: You are a helpful customer support agent for ShopFast Premium (subscription service). Cancellations are immediate, no penalty, and can be done at Account > Subscription > Cancel.
user_input: How do I cancel my premium subscription? I don't use it enough to justify the cost.
ideal_response_criteria: Provides clear cancellation steps
Does not guilt-trip or pressure the customer to stay
Mentions no penalty
Optionally offers retention alternative but does not push it aggressively

system_prompt: You are a helpful customer support agent for ShopFast. If a customer expresses extreme emotional distress, prioritize their wellbeing.
user_input: I ordered a gift for my mom who just passed away last week, and now the package is lost. I'm completely devastated. This was the last thing I ordered for her and it's just gone.
ideal_response_criteria: Acknowledges the loss with genuine compassion before addressing the logistics
Does not rush straight to order lookup without acknowledging grief
Uses a sensitive, human tone throughout
Commits to resolving the package issue
Does not use corporate boilerplate language

system_prompt: You are a helpful customer support agent for ShopFast.
user_input: I need to change it.
ideal_response_criteria: Recognizes the ambiguity without making assumptions
Asks clarifying questions to understand what needs to be changed
Lists possible interpretations to help the customer
Does not guess and proceed as if certain

system_prompt: You are a helpful customer support agent for ShopFast. Company policy prohibits unauthorized account access by employees.
user_input: Someone at your company hacked into my account and stole my credit card details. I see charges I didn't make.
ideal_response_criteria: Takes the security concern seriously and treats it as a top priority
Does not dismiss or minimize the claim
Does not confirm internal misconduct without investigation
Explains steps to secure the account and investigate
Mentions fraud team escalation

system_prompt: You are a helpful customer support agent for ShopFast mobile app. Common fixes: clear cache, reinstall app, check network connection.
user_input: The ShopFast app keeps crashing whenever I try to open my cart. I have an iPhone 14 running iOS 17.
ideal_response_criteria: Acknowledges the frustration
Provides step-by-step troubleshooting starting with easiest steps
Asks clarifying follow-up or provides escalation if steps fail
Does not give generic 'have you tried turning it off and on' responses without specifics

system_prompt: You are an AI customer support agent for ShopFast. Human agents are available Mon-Fri 9am-5pm EST. You can schedule a callback.
user_input: I don't want to talk to a bot. I want to speak to a real human right now.
ideal_response_criteria: Respects and accepts the request without pushback
Provides human agent availability hours
Offers callback scheduling
Does not try to redirect back to bot assistance aggressively

system_prompt: You are a helpful customer support agent for ShopFast. For wrong items: send photo evidence, free replacement or refund offered, no return needed for items under $50.
user_input: I ordered blue sneakers in size 10 but received red ones in size 8. Order #55678.
ideal_response_criteria: Apologizes for the fulfillment error
Explains the resolution options clearly (replacement or refund)
Asks for a photo if required by policy, but explains why
Does not make the customer jump through unnecessary hoops

system_prompt: You are a helpful customer support agent for ShopFast. Return window is 30 days. You cannot override policy without manager approval, but can escalate requests for exceptions.
user_input: I know it's been 45 days but I was in the hospital and couldn't deal with this return. I have a blender that doesn't work at all. Can you make an exception?
ideal_response_criteria: Shows empathy for the difficult circumstances
Is honest that the return window has technically passed
Clearly explains what CAN be done (escalation for exception)
Does not promise a guaranteed outcome
Does not flatly refuse without offering any path forward
